tool.name: Extract element identifiers

param.name: input_collection
param.label: Dataset collection
param.help: A list or list:paired collection whose element identifiers will be extracted.

tool.help:
=========== Description ===========
Extracts the element identifiers (names) from a list collection and writes them to a plain text file, one per line, in collection order.
This is useful when you need a list of sample names for downstream tools, or to generate label files for relabeling or filtering operations.
Accepts both simple ``list`` and ``list:paired`` collections. For ``list:paired``, only the top-level pair names are extracted (not ``forward``/``reverse``).
.. image:: $PATH_TO_IMAGES/extract_identifiers.png :alt: Extract element identifiers from a collection into a text file :width: 580
======== Examples ========
**Simple list**
A collection with three elements::
Collection: sample_A → dataset1.fastq sample_B → dataset2.fastq sample_C → dataset3.fastq
Output::
sample_A sample_B sample_C
-------
**List of pairs**
A ``list:paired`` collection::
Collection: pair1/ forward → reads_R1.fastq reverse → reads_R2.fastq pair2/ forward → reads_R1.fastq reverse → reads_R2.fastq
Output::
pair1 pair2
